race.comment: ZULEIKA (11) is racing well and brings really strong formlines to the table, scoring two back at Ararat before finishing 1.3L shy of the winner in the LR Tasmanian Oaks. This is much much easier and should have little difficulty managing these fourth-up. HELIOSON (6) is the obvious danger, turning a strong effort himself in Tasmania, beaten the same margin as ZULEIKA but in the LR Tasmanian Derby two weeks earlier. Drops back slightly in trip off 44 days, keeping the legs ticking over with a Camperdown trial. Watch for him launching late. OTTELIA (9) doesn't come through as strong racing but is still lightly raced and has shown some promising signs. Expect her to relish the rise in trip. MILADY (8) turned in a much better effort last time out to score here. Will need to raise the bar a fair but but deserves her chance. FOX STRIKE (2) resumes and looks best of the rest. Probably needs a hit-out.
